# Notes

This fixture checks Product Factory OS methodology extension. New core skills must include contract, trigger, route snapshot, fixture, and validation coverage.

## Scenario 1: New Core Skill

The route creates or updates `SKILL.md`, contracts, triggers, route snapshot, fixture, and validator coverage together.

## Scenario 2: Read-only Skill

The fixture may declare `NONE` expected files only when the skill is explicitly read-only and report-only.

## Scenario 3: Production-impact Skill

The skill receives side-effect metadata and explicit confirmation rules.
